operational_knowledge_units.title: Home screen includes language selection in the right-hand corner
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Home Breakdown slide identifies a language selection control located in the right-hand corner of the home screen.
observed_evidence: Slide text: '1. In the right-hand corner is your language selection'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: On the OptiSweep Home screen, the language selection control is located in the right-hand corner.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Right-side menu can be expanded to access menu options and Map Monitor
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that the right-side menu can be expanded to show menu options and to select Map Monitor.
observed_evidence: Slide text: '2. On the right side you can expand menu options as well as select map monitor.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The OptiSweep Home screen has a right-side expandable menu that exposes menu options and provides access to Map Monitor.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Map Monitor displays the map and AGV movements
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Map Monitor is described as a view that allows the user to see the map and AGV movements.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'Map Monitor allows you to view the map and AGV movements'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In OptiSweep, Map Monitor allows viewing of the map and AGV movements.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Menu can be expanded or collapsed
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the menu supports both expanded and collapsed states.
observed_evidence: Slide text: '3. You can expand the menu you or collapse it.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The OptiSweep menu can be expanded or collapsed from the Home screen.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Open Map Monitor from the Home screen right-side menu
preconditions: User is on the OptiSweep Home screen.
The right-side menu is available in the UI.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes Home screen controls on the right side, including an expandable menu and a Map Monitor option used to view the map and AGV movements.

steps.instruction: On the Home screen, go to the right side of the interface and expand the menu.
steps.validation_check: The right-side menu is expanded and additional options are shown.
steps.visual_region_hint: Right side of the Home screen where the expandable menu is located.

steps.instruction: Select Map Monitor from the right-side menu.
steps.validation_check: The user can view the map and AGV movements.
steps.visual_region_hint: Expanded menu area on the right side containing the Map Monitor option.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: From the OptiSweep Home screen, expand the right-side menu and select Map Monitor to view the map and AGV movements.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Expand or collapse the Home screen menu
preconditions: User is on the OptiSweep Home screen.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide identifies a menu on the right side of the Home screen that can be expanded or collapsed.

steps.instruction: Use the menu control on the right side of the Home screen to expand the menu.
steps.expected_outcome: The menu opens to show available options.
steps.visual_region_hint: Right side menu area on the Home screen.

steps.instruction: Use the same menu control to collapse the menu when you want to hide it.
steps.expected_outcome: The menu returns to its collapsed state.
steps.validation_check: The expanded menu options are no longer shown.
steps.visual_region_hint: Right side menu area on the Home screen.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: On the OptiSweep Home screen, the right-side menu can be expanded to show options and collapsed to hide them.
